## 💼 Experience

**Web Developer** @ Provecom OÜ *(Nov 2025 - Present)*
> Website and e-commerce platform development. Building modern web solutions for clients.

**Software Developer** @ Diara Infra *(Jun 2025 - Oct 2025 · Internship)*
> Full-stack development and systems integration. Built REST APIs, browser extensions, and automated workflows. Managed Docker environments and handled database migrations.

**IT Specialist** @ Põhja-Sakala Municipality *(Oct 2023 - Apr 2024 · Internship)*
> Configured and managed Zabbix monitoring, Active Directory, DHCP, and DNS servers. Planned and implemented VLANs. Hardware setup and maintenance.
